src/main/resources/application-dev.yml.general_idea: Introduce explicit logging level configuration for root, Hibernate SQL, and application packages.
src/main/resources/application-dev.yml.human_impl:
logging:
  level:
    ROOT: INFO
    org.hibernate.SQL: DEBUG
    net.mariasoft.administrations: DEBUG

src/main/resources/application-dev.yml.general_idea: Configure Spring Boot DevTools for restart behavior and livereload exclusion.
src/main/resources/application-dev.yml.human_impl:
spring:
  devtools:
    restart:
      enabled: true
      additional-exclude: static/**
    livereload:
      enabled: false

src/main/resources/application-dev.yml.general_idea: Enable pretty-printing for JSON serialization output.
Define PostgreSQL datasource connection details and HikariCP pool settings.

spring:
  datasource:
    type: com.zaxxer.hikari.HikariDataSource
    url: jdbc:postgresql://localhost:5432/mariasoftdb
    username: hypnoz
    password: Supercreator5.
    hikari:
      poolName: Hikari
      auto-commit: false
